---
title: "Land_Cover_Comparison"
output: html_document
---

# Libraries

```{r}

# Libraries
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggspatial)

```

# Select Path
```{r}

base_dir <- "Data/Senegal/LandCover" # Change to Chad when needed

```

# Trend Line

## Prepare Files and Build Raster Stack

```{r}

# List all .tif files and extract years
lc_files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
years <- as.numeric(regmatches(basename(lc_files), regexpr("[0-9]{4}", basename(lc_files))))

# Create a dataframe to ensure files are sorted 
file_df <- data.frame(File = lc_files, Year = years) %>% 
  arrange(Year)

# Load sorted files into multi-layer raster stack
lc_stack <- rast(file_df$File)
names(lc_stack) <- paste0("Y", file_df$Year) # Name layers Y2001, Y2002, etc.

```

## Exclude Water Pixels

```{r}

# Excludes any pixels that are/were water.

# This boolean check creates a stack of TRUE/FALSE (1/0) for water presence
water_check <- lc_stack == 17 | lc_stack == 0

# Sum across all years (layers). If the sum is > 0, it was water at least once.
water_sum <- sum(water_check, na.rm = TRUE)
master_water_mask <- ifel(water_sum > 0, 1, 0)

```

## Isolating Barren Land

```{r}

# Set the master water pixels to NA across all layers in the stack
lc_stack_masked <- ifel(master_water_mask == 1, NA, lc_stack)

# Create a binary stack where Barren (16) = 1, and everything else = NA
barren_stack <- ifel(lc_stack_masked == 16, 1, NA)

```

## Calculate Total Barren Land per Year

```{r}

barren_pixel_counts <- global(barren_stack, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)

# Converting from 500m to km^2
pixel_area_km2 <- 0.25 

trend_data <- data.frame(
  Year = file_df$Year,
  Barren_Pixels = barren_pixel_counts$sum
  ) %>%
  mutate(Area_km2 = Barren_Pixels * pixel_area_km2)

print(trend_data)

```

## Generate Plot

```{r}

trend_plot <- ggplot(trend_data, aes(x = Year, y = Area_km2)) +
  geom_line(color = "#d68d24", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#c24f44", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linetype = "dashed", se = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = trend_data$Year) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Total Barren Area in Senegal: 2001-2024", # Dont forget to change title
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Total Barren Area ("~km^2~")")
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(trend_plot)

```

## Save Output to Folder

```{r}

#output_filename <- file.path("Images/Diagrams", paste0("Barren_Land_Trendline_Senegal.png"))
#ggsave(output_filename, plot = trend_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#output_filename <- file.path("Images/Diagrams", paste0("Barren_Land_Trendline_Chad.png"))
# ggsave(output_filename, plot = trend_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```

# Comparison Map 2001-2024

## Select Start and End Year files

```{r}

early_idx <- 1
late_idx <- nrow(file_df)

start_year <- file_df$Year[early_idx]
end_year <- file_df$Year[late_idx]

r_early <- rast(file_df$File[early_idx])
r_late <- rast(file_df$File[late_idx])

```

## Binary Change on Barren Class (16)
```{r}

# Create binary masks where Barren=1, Not Barren=0
m_early_barren <- ifel(r_early == 16, 1, 0)
m_late_barren <- ifel(r_late == 16, 1, 0)

# 0  (0*10 + 0) -> Was Not Barren, Is Not Barren -> Stable Non-Desert
# 1  (0*10 + 1) -> Was Not Barren, Is Barren -> Desertification
# 10 (1*10 + 0) -> Was Barren, Is Not Barren -> Greening / Reversal
# 11 (1*10 + 1) -> Was Barren, Is Barren -> Stable Desert

change_raw <- (m_early_barren * 10) + m_late_barren

```

## Water Mask and Factorize

```{r}

# Apply the water mask (1 = water ever present, set to NA)
change_map_masked <- ifel(master_water_mask == 1, NA, change_raw)

# Factorize the raster
change_map_factor <- as.factor(change_map_masked)

# Define factor levels
map_levels <- data.frame(
  id = c(0, 1, 10, 11),
  Category = c(
    "Stable Non-Desert", 
    "Desertification (New Desert)", 
    "Greening (Reversal)", 
    "Stable Desert"
  )
)

levels(change_map_factor) <- map_levels

```

## Generate Plot

```{r}

region_name <- basename(dirname(base_dir)) 

# Define a 4-color palette
change_colors <- c(
  "Stable Non-Desert" = "#e8ebd1",            # Pale, muted green/beige
  "Stable Desert" = "#f5deb3",                # Sand/Wheat color
  "Desertification (New Desert)" = "#cc0000", # Bold Red
  "Greening (Reversal)" = "#009900"           # Bold Green
)

comp_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = change_map_factor) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = change_colors,
    name = "Transition Type",
    na.translate = FALSE 
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = crs(change_map_factor)) + 
  theme_bw() + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(
    title = paste0(region_name, " Region: Land Cover Dynamics"),
    subtitle = paste("Comparison:", start_year, "vs", end_year),
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.3) + 
  annotation_north_arrow(location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.1)
  )

print(comp_map)

```

## Save Output

```{r}

output_filename_map <- file.path("Images/Diagrams", paste0(region_name, "_Change_Map_", start_year, "_", end_year, ".png"))
ggsave(output_filename_map, plot = comp_map, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```
